Dharmadurai Endha Pakkam Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Rahul Nambiar & Chinmayi
Music: Yuvan

sogam adhu megam
naan sonnaal adhu pogum
un kanneer yaendhum
kannam naan aagum.

manasai salavai
seyya oru kanneer
vali thaan undu.

un uyirai salavai
seyya oru kadhal
nadhi undu.

un uchcham thalaiyai
theenda oru urimai
undaa pennae

un vaarthaikku munnaal
en vazhve un pinnaal
un madiyil endhan
kanneer vadiyumadi

un sogam oru megam
naan sonnaal adhu pogum
un kanneer yaendhum
kannam naanaagum..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Endha Pakkam?

The song Endha Pakkam explores themes of love and the choices one makes in relationships, reflecting on the paths of affection.

How does Endha Pakkam fit into the plot of Dharmadurai?

This song is pivotal in Dharmadurai, showcasing the emotional connection between the lead characters as they navigate their romantic journey.

Who are the singers of Endha Pakkam?

The song features the talented voices of Chinmayi and Rahul Nambiar, who bring the lyrics to life with their harmonious duet.

Who composed the music for Endha Pakkam?

The music for Endha Pakkam was composed by the acclaimed Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique sound and style.

When was Endha Pakkam released?

Endha Pakkam was released on August 4, 2016, as part of the movie Dharmadurai.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Endha Pakkam, the characters express their deep emotions and choices in love, making it a significant moment in Dharmadurai. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing. It beautifully captures the essence of romantic relationships, inviting listeners to reflect on their own experiences. With its captivating composition by Yuvan and the enchanting vocals of Chinmayi and Rahul Nambiar, this song resonates with anyone who has ever loved deeply.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Endha Pakkam from Dharmadurai is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Chinmayi and Rahul Nambiar, paired with Yuvan's soulful composition, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of this collaboration that brings forth a heartfelt expression of romance.
stanzaMeanings: When I see the sky, it feels complete.
You can choose any path, there are people around.
When I see a love story, love exists.
Even if small troubles come, life goes on.
If the rose flowers cry, it brings sweetness.
Oh my king, if you cry, I will drown in it.
That sorrow is like a cloud, if I say it, your tears will flow.
When I see the sky, it feels complete.
You can choose any path, there are people around.
If happiness is always there, what is the need for tomorrow?
If the day always passes, it cannot bear the burden.
There is a tear that can express the heart's pain.
There is a love river that can give life to you.
Your breath can change the direction of the wind.
You can live in another life with another name.
If circumstances create trouble, what joy is there?
In the water of the well, thirst cannot be quenched.
Will thirst be quenched if you come as rain?
You are giving life without knowing our relationship.
Is there a right to remove your crown, oh girl?
If you touch your heart, it is enough, oh dear.
When I see the sky, it feels complete.
I can choose any path, there are people around.
You can embrace and hold me, that is enough.
You can rest in my heart, that is enough.
Before your words, my life is behind you, my tears are in your lap.
Your sorrow is like a cloud, if I say it, your tears will flow.
